= Special Section Numbering
:sectnums:
:toc:

[preface]
== Preface

Preface body.

=== Background

A subsection of the preface. With `:sectnums:`, neither the preface nor its
subsections are numbered (issue #408).

== First Chapter

Chapter body.

=== Details

Numbered subsection.

==== Fine Print

Deeper numbered subsection.

== Second Chapter

The numbered sequence continues past the preface.
